title: How predominantly Black areas in 6 states have been split up by redistricting
description: These maps show that the redistricting battle President Trump initiated has so far had a particular impact on largely Black congressional districts in Republican-led states.

title: 'New York Times' alleges White House abuses legal system to intimidate reporters
description: The New York Times will argue in court Thursday that the White House is abusing the justice system to intimidate reporters over a story that angered President Trump.

title: Amish Shah beats Democratic establishment pick in House primary in Arizona
description: Rep. Andy Biggs, who voted to overturn the 2020 election results, won the GOP nomination for governor. Among Democrats, a left-wing challenger failed to unseat Rep. Greg Stanton.

title: House passes Pentagon funding bill and a blueprint to unlock new dollars for Iran war
description: Republicans passed more than $1 trillion for the Pentagon alongside a budget blueprint to fund the war with Iran and implement provisions of President Trump's election overhaul bill.

title: Trump administration signs commercial nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
description: The agreement gives American companies priority access to nuclear reactors and fuel to Saudi Arabia. It's expected to last decades and be worth billions of dollars.

title: Latest combat deaths show risk has shifted to troops far from Iran’s borders
description: Trump flew to Delaware to honor soldiers killed in the Iran war, which has proved deadly for those far from the front lines.

title: Mamdani says New York doesn’t have authority to arrest Netanyahu, urges feds to act
description: The mayor had said the city might enforce a warrant against the Israeli leader, drawing Democratic criticism. On Tuesday, he urged the U.S. government to do so.

title: People are watching the Reflecting Pool like reality TV. What does that say about us?
description: It's not just watching paint dry. The twists and turns of the Reflecting Pool repairs, originally a two-week project, have kept bloggers and viewers busy all summer.

title: Democrats chip away at GOP cash lead centered on Trump
description: Republicans stockpiled money from big donors in national groups heading into the fall campaign season, while individual Democrats have drawn on stronger voter enthusiasm.

title: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth defends Iran war funding request at fiery hearing
description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth faced a barrage of questions about the war with Iran from lawmakers on Tuesday, as the administration seeks more money for the escalating conflict.

title: Sen. Patty Murray, D-Wash., on Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth's Senate testimony
description: NPR's Leila Fadel speaks with Democratic Sen. Patty Murray of Washington about the administration's Iran war objectives following the testimony of Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth.

title: States want to bring Medicaid behind bars. Federal changes make that harder
description: Funding cuts and program changes required by President Trump's big budget law are forcing states to rethink bipartisan efforts to bring Medicaid into jails and prisons.

title: Trump has campaigned more so far in 2026 midterms than he did at this point in 2018
description: Heading to Georgia on Wednesday, President Trump is campaigning more often this year than he did in the same period for 2018 and has already rallied for a dozen candidates in toss-up races.

title: Trump-backed candidates, 2020 election deniers, win Arizona primaries
description: The primaries set the field for what are expected to be heated contests for Congress and governor in a swing state this fall.

title: Trump meets with Lebanese leader, pledges support for peace efforts with Israel
description: The event marked the White House’s latest attempt to broker an Israeli pullout from southern Lebanon, where Israel has been fighting Hezbollah.
